texto: They are few in the midst of an overwhelming mass of brute force, and their submission is wisdom; but for a nation like England to submit to be robbed by any invader who chooses to visit her shores seemed to me to be nonsense.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a George Combe: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “They are few in the midst of an overwhelming mass of brute force, and their submission is wisdom;…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, me, nation pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de nation e her.
